    Methods in org.cibseven.connect.ai.agent.impl with parameters of type AgentRequest
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected dev.langchain4j.memory.chat.ChatMemoryProvider
    AgentConnectorImpl.createChatMemoryProvider(AgentRequest request)
    Factory method — builds the ChatMemoryProvider used when chat memory is active.
    protected dev.langchain4j.model.chat.ChatModel
    AgentConnectorImpl.createChatModel(AgentRequest request, String apiKey, String baseUrl, Map<String,String> customHeaders)
    Factory method — override in tests to inject a stubbed chat model.
    protected dev.langchain4j.rag.content.retriever.ContentRetriever
    AgentConnectorImpl.createContentRetriever(AgentRequest request)
    Factory method — builds and returns a ContentRetriever backed by pgvector when pgHost is present in the request, or null to skip RAG entirely.
    protected dev.langchain4j.model.embedding.EmbeddingModel
    AgentConnectorImpl.createEmbeddingModel(AgentRequest request)
    Factory method — override in tests to inject a stubbed embedding model.
    protected List<dev.langchain4j.mcp.client.McpClient>
    AgentConnectorImpl.createMcpClients(AgentRequest request)
    Factory method — override in tests to inject stubbed MCP clients.
    protected dev.langchain4j.store.embedding.EmbeddingStore<dev.langchain4j.data.segment.TextSegment>
    AgentConnectorImpl.createRagEmbeddingStore(AgentRequest request)
    Factory method — builds the pgvector embedding store used as the RAG backend.
    AgentResponse
    AgentConnectorImpl.execute(AgentRequest request)
